claim: No Stable, release, conformance, or manual assistive-technology claim is made by this source contract.
summary: A strictly noninteractive category, status, or localized count badge.
semantics: Badge always renders a span and rejects every React event handler plus href, accessKey, editable/drag state, focus, role, dangerous HTML, and generic accessible-name overrides at type and runtime boundaries.
Status mode uses badge.status to localize punctuation and severity/label order while preserving fully wrapping visible text.
Count mode exposes a localized exact accessible label even when only the visual count is capped.
Interactive use wraps Badge in a correctly named Button or Link without changing Badge semantics.

preferences.forcedColors: System colors preserve boundaries, text, state, and focus without color-only meaning.
preferences.reducedMotion: No semantic information depends on motion.
preferences.rtl: Logical properties mirror layout and bdi isolates localized numeric values where applicable.

responsive.overflowPolicy: Text wraps, actions reflow, and content remains readable without document clipping or hidden recovery paths.
